name: DocuSign — Send Envelope
description: Send a document or template to one or more signers via DocuSign. The task completes immediately after sending; use an Intermediate Message Catch Event (message: envelope.completed) to wait for all signatures.

properties.label: Integration Key
properties.description: DocuSign application/client ID. Use a secret reference: {{secrets.DOCUSIGN_INTEGRATION_KEY}}

properties.label: Account ID
properties.description: DocuSign Account ID (UUID). Use a secret reference: {{secrets.DOCUSIGN_ACCOUNT_ID}}

properties.label: User ID
properties.description: DocuSign User GUID to impersonate via JWT grant. Must have granted consent to the integration key. Use a secret: {{secrets.DOCUSIGN_USER_ID}}

properties.label: RSA Private Key
properties.description: PEM-encoded RSA private key registered for the integration key in DocuSign. Use a secret: {{secrets.DOCUSIGN_RSA_PRIVATE_KEY}}

properties.label: Environment
properties.description: Use 'demo' for sandbox testing; 'production' for live sending.

properties.label: Document Source
properties.description: How to provide the document to sign

properties.label: Document Variable
properties.description: Process variable containing the uploaded file (StoredFile object or R2 key string). E.g. = contractFile

properties.label: Template ID
properties.description: DocuSign template ID (if using a pre-built template instead of an uploaded document)

properties.label: Signers
properties.description: FEEL array of signers. For direct documents: [{name: clientName, email: clientEmail}]. For templates, include roleName: [{name: clientName, email: clientEmail, roleName: "Signer 1"}]

properties.label: Email Subject
properties.description: Subject line of the DocuSign invitation email. FEEL supported.

properties.label: Message Name
properties.description: Must match the message name on the Intermediate Message Catch Event that waits for the signature.

properties.label: Envelope ID Variable
properties.description: Process variable name where the DocuSign envelope ID is stored. The Intermediate Catch Event must correlate on this field.

properties.label: Webhook HMAC Key
properties.description: HMAC secret configured in DocuSign Connect for webhook signature verification. Use a secret: {{secrets.DOCUSIGN_WEBHOOK_HMAC_KEY}}

properties.label: Retries
properties.description: Number of retry attempts on API failure
